name: Rules engine

---

## Rule purpose

What decision or score does this rule support?

## Inputs

List the data inputs required.

## Logic

Describe the deterministic rule.

## Output

What should the rule return?

## Explainability

What should the user see as the reason?

## Edge cases

What happens when data is missing, stale or low confidence?

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Rule is deterministic
- [ ] Rule handles missing data
- [ ] Rule returns confidence
- [ ] Rule can be tested
